editorial_accuracy.notes: Evidence tier badges in chapter headers. Source counts on homepage cards. In-chapter TOC. Keyword-based related chapters. Reading time on all cards. Semantic table captions.

information_design.notes: Chapter TOC for long articles. Evidence composition at-a-glance. Algorithmic topic matching for related chapters. Featured article card shows reading time + source count.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Back-to-top button. Scroll position persistence. Evidence badges use semantic tier colors. Safe-area-inset for notch devices. Mobile menu Escape key close.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. DownloadPDF deferred import (400KB→5KB initial). Reusable hooks + components. Shared utilities. No hardcoded values.

accessibility.notes: aria-current='page' on nav links. Focus rings. Auth modal focus trap. Mobile nav Escape + aria-controls. Three distinct nav landmarks with aria-labels. Semantic table captions. Skip-to-content link.

security.notes: CSP meta tag restricts resources to self + Google Fonts + Stripe. X-Content-Type-Options nosniff. Strict referrer policy. All external links noopener noreferrer.
